title: Using Monday as a Computerized Maintenance Management System (CMMS)
excerpt: Hello! Just wondering if anyone has used Monday as a Computerized Maintenance Management System (CMMS)?

posts.author: mpelkey (Melissa)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! Just wondering if anyone has used Monday as a Computerized Maintenance Management System (CMMS)?

posts.author: emilyb (Emily Bisbach)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

While I’m not entirely familiar with the ins-and-outs of a CMMS, the basic principle looks like something the monday.com platform could absolutely do! If you haven’t already, I’d suggest signing up for a free trial account, and then exploring our Template Center. Specifically, our Project Management templates might offer a good structure for getting things set up (you can edit these templates in any way necessary for your workflow). You might also benefit from attending one of our live, daily webinars, as this will give you a basic walkthrough of the essentials on the platform to help you determine if it would be a good fit You can sign up here: Live webinars | monday.com

Hope this helps!
